title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group has an exciting opening for a Digital Marketing Manager at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
